headline: Kieran Trippier
body: New - Kieran Trippier is fully committed to #Wolves after the shock sacking of Rob Edwards. Trippier has been in contact with new head coach Cesar Peixoto and will report for pre-season in July. Plus Wolves line up exits + big changes behin
text: New - Kieran Trippier is fully committed to #Wolves after the shock sacking of Rob Edwards. Trippier has been in contact with new head coach Cesar Peixoto and will report for pre-season in July. Plus Wolves line up exits + big changes behind the scenes https://t.co/9EnjcGAdWx
